score_mw_someip_config_Root.description: Top-level element of the gateway configuration

service_types.description: The type definitions of existing services.

score_mw_someip_config_ServiceType.description: Describes a SOME/IP service type: its network identity, versioning and service elements

service_type_name.description: Human-readable label for this service type. Used for logging and diagnostics only;

service_id.description:
16-bit service identifier as defined in the SOME/IP specification.
Must be unique across all service types in this configuration.

service_version_major.description: Major version of the service interface. A breaking API change increments this value.

service_version_minor.description:
Minor version of the service interface. Non-breaking additions increment this value.
The default 0xFFFFFFFF is the SOME/IP wildcard meaning "accept any minor version".

events.description: All events published by this service type.

methods.description: All methods published by this service type.

local_service_instances.description: Instances of this service hosted on this machine that shall be offered to the network.

remote_service_instances.description: Instances of this service available on remote machines that shall be consumed.

score_mw_someip_config_ServiceInstance.description: Each entry identifies and describes a specific SOME/IP service instance.

instance_id.description:
16-bit SOME/IP Instance ID as defined in the SOME/IP specification.
Together with service_id, uniquely identifies this instance on the network.

score_mw_someip_config_NullSerializerCon.description:
Configuration for the null serializer, which does not perform actual serialization but
instead uses pre-serialized message buffers.

max_message_size.description: Size of the pre-serialized message buffers.

score_mw_someip_config_Event.description: Describes a single event within a service.

event_id.description:
16-bit identifier for this event within the service.
Corresponds to the Method ID field in the SOME/IP specification for event notifications.

event_name.description:
Name of the event. Must exactly match the field name in the score::mw::com
service interface definition to correlate SOME/IP event IDs with IPC events.

score_mw_someip_config_Method.description: Describes a single method within a service.

method_id.description:
16-bit identifier for this method within the service.
Corresponds to the Method ID field in the SOME/IP specification.

method_name.description:
Name of the method. Must exactly match the field name in the score::mw::com
service interface definition to correlate SOME/IP method IDs with IPC methods.

request_serialization_config.description: Serialization configuration for the request (call) of this method.

response_serialization_config.description: Serialization configuration for the response (return) of this method.
